# changebrief

> changebrief monitors web pages and uses AI (GPT-4o Vision) to tell you exactly what changed — not just that something changed. No blurry screenshots. No red pixels. Just a clear sentence.

## How it works
1. Takes periodic screenshots of web pages using Playwright
2. Detects visual changes with pixel comparison
3. Sends before/after to GPT-4o Vision for analysis
4. Delivers a human-readable summary: "Acme Corp removed the 'Free for 14 days' button and raised Pro pricing from $29 to $34/month."

- [Homepage](https://changebrief.io)

- [Security & Trust](https://changebrief.io/security)
- [Privacy Policy](https://changebrief.io/privacy)
- [Terms of Service](https://changebrief.io/terms)
- [Data Processing Agreement](https://changebrief.io/dpa)

## Swedish pages
- [Startsida](https://changebrief.io/sv)

- [Säkerhet](https://changebrief.io/sv/security)
- [Integritetspolicy](https://changebrief.io/sv/privacy)
- [Villkor](https://changebrief.io/sv/terms)

## Use cases
- Product managers monitoring competitor pricing pages
- Sales teams tracking supplier terms changes
- Compliance teams watching regulatory updates
- DevOps teams monitoring status pages
